entries.source_label: Plan tasks must have checkboxes for progress tracking
entries.rationale: The ai-plan skill already codifies checkbox-form task lines as part of the plan contract, so this lesson is already covered by a canonical skill surface.

entries.source_label: /ai-pr MUST clear spec.md and plan.md after PR creation
entries.rationale: The ai-pr skill already owns this behavior: generate from spec and plan, update specs/_history.md, clear spec.md and plan.md, and stage the cleared files. Keeping this in LESSONS duplicates a live skill contract.

entries.source_label: Existing PR updates must reconcile branch spec history
entries.rationale: Useful funnel guidance, but I could not verify repetition beyond this source or a nearby governed owner that should absorb it today. Per the placement matrix, it stays in the learning funnel.

entries.source_label: Brainstorm scope, naming, and provider-intake nuance cluster
entries.rationale: These are specific brainstorm and provider-intake heuristics with only single-source corroboration and no nearby governed owner that can validate them today. Per the placement matrix, they remain in the learning funnel.

group_members.label: During brainstorm, scope corrections must be reflected immediately in the draft spec
During brainstorm, naming decisions stay provisional until the user reconfirms them
Provider-side automation must respect hierarchy limits from manifest policy
Provider-side `ready` does not mean auto-execute locally

entries.source_label: Promotion from team context into framework context must be selective and product-driven
entries.rationale: The placement matrix now canonically separates reusable framework guidance from team-local conventions, which subsumes this promotion rule. Keeping the lesson would duplicate the phase-1 contract.

entries.source_label: ai-run consolidation and baseline-exploration cluster
entries.rationale: The ai-run skill already makes explicit consolidation and baseline exploration part of the runtime contract, so these lessons are already preserved in canonical run surfaces.

group_members.label: Autonomous orchestrators must define consolidation, not only execution
Baseline exploration must happen before DAG and wave planning

entries.source_label: Audit framing and child-spec decomposition cluster
entries.rationale: These are useful brainstorming heuristics, but I could not verify repetition beyond this source or a nearby governed owner that should absorb them today. Per the placement matrix, they stay in the learning funnel.

group_members.label: A one-time audit is not a justification to invent a new permanent workflow
When a new workstream appears mid-brainstorm, expand the child-spec decomposition explicitly

entries.source_label: Skill-vs-agent pairs need an explicit canonical source of truth
entries.rationale: Nearby canonical skill contracts already state that SKILL.md owns the user-facing contract and paired agent files are subordinate specialist surfaces. This lesson is already codified where it is enforced.

entries.source_label: Inspiration-repo interpretation cluster
entries.rationale: These are useful design-interrogation heuristics, but I could not verify repetition beyond this source or a nearby governed owner that should absorb them today. Per the placement matrix, they stay in the learning funnel.

group_members.label: When a user cites an inspiration repo, copy the architecture pattern, not just a single feature
Do not mirror an inspiration repo more literally than the user wants

entries.source_label: Review and verify mode, validation, and attribution contract cluster
entries.rationale: These mode, coverage, validation, and attribution rules are already codified across the current ai-review and ai-verify skill contracts. Keeping the exploratory lessons would duplicate live skill behavior.

group_members.label: efficient mode
When the user asks for parity across sibling surfaces, mirror the dispatch model explicitly
Mode names and default grouping counts are part of the contract
Default modes should stay implicit when the user wants a clean command surface
Explicit expensive modes need a concrete CLI shape
For cost-sensitive multi-agent defaults, prefer fixed macro-agents with adaptive internal lenses
Do not blur coverage with decomposition when discussing agent profiles
Validation stages can be shared across profiles even when agent grouping differs
Universal validation is a valid choice even when it increases cost
Similar orchestration surfaces do not need identical validation pipelines
Execution grouping and report attribution are separate design choices
Preserve specialist attribution across sibling orchestration surfaces

entries.source_label: Framework changes must converge across all mirrors, templates, and sync surfaces
entries.rationale: Cross-IDE mirror convergence is already governed by the Constitution and manifest ownership metadata, which define generated mirrors, canonical sources, and sync responsibilities.

entries.source_label: Skill-surface simplification cluster
entries.rationale: These are useful simplification heuristics, but I could not verify repetition beyond this source or a nearby governed owner that should absorb them today. Per the placement matrix, they stay in the learning funnel.

group_members.label: Narrow multi-mode skills when the user wants one sharp responsibility
Elimination can be the simplification, not migration

entries.source_label: Question-boundary and profile-discussion cluster
entries.rationale: These are useful questioning heuristics, but I could not verify repetition beyond this source or a nearby governed owner that should absorb them today. Per the placement matrix, they stay in the learning funnel.

group_members.label: Stable framework orchestration should not become per-project config by default
Ask nested architecture questions at the right boundary

entries.source_label: Umbrella-spec cleanup and UX-reference cluster
entries.rationale: These are useful spec-editing and UX-direction heuristics, but I could not verify repetition beyond this source or a nearby governed owner that should absorb them today. Per the placement matrix, they stay in the learning funnel.

group_members.label: If the user removes a whole workstream from the umbrella spec, remove it cleanly and rebalance the decomposition
Reference visuals should become explicit UX direction, not vague inspiration

entries.source_label: Brainstorm parallel-explore workflow
entries.rationale: This pattern repeats across LESSONS, instincts, and proposals, changes the questioning procedure of one skill, and still lacks canonical ownership in the brainstorm skill contract. The placement matrix points it to the relevant SKILL.md.

entries.source_label: manifest.yml es la fuente de verdad absoluta
entries.rationale: The manifest is already the governed machine-readable source of truth for framework metadata, and nearby contracts already instruct agents and validators to read it rather than hardcode providers or surfaces.

entries.source_label: `/ai-*` no se traduce a `ai-eng *`
entries.rationale: The slash-command boundary is already explicit in root instructions and the ai-start skill contract, so this lesson is already preserved in canonical cross-IDE governance surfaces.

entries.source_label: spec-104 CI and immutable-test exception cluster
entries.rationale: These are tactical post-spec CI and test-governance heuristics tied to a closed workstream, and I could not verify a nearby governed surface that should absorb them today. Per the placement matrix, they stay in the learning funnel.

group_members.label: `--deselect` antes que `--ignore` para flakes platform-specific
Quarantine en CI workflow + pre-push gate deben estar sincronizados
no tocar bajo ninguna circunstancia

entries.source_label: Brainstorm interrogation and named-tool selection corrections cluster
entries.rationale: These remain heuristic corrections with limited corroboration and no verified governed owner nearby. Per the placement matrix, they remain in the learning funnel until they repeat and a canonical home is clearer.

group_members.label: Brainstorm interrogation questions must be self-explanatory to non-engineers
Lead with recommendation when presenting approach options
Confundir telemetría mecánica (hooks) con observación behavioral (LLM)
Proponer skill del framework cuando existe un skill externo equivalente

entries.source_label: CLI branding and global-output corrections cluster
entries.rationale: These are tactical UI and output corrections with limited corroboration and no verified governed owner nearby. Per the placement matrix, they remain in the learning funnel until they repeat and a canonical home is clearer.

group_members.label: No abreviar elementos de marca del producto sin aprobación
Añadir spacing vertical alrededor de banners/headers CLI
Verificar comandos especiales al añadir output global en CLI callback

entries.source_label: Activation, provider, onboarding, and audit-discipline corrections cluster
entries.rationale: These remain heuristic corrections with limited corroboration and no verified governed owner nearby. Per the placement matrix, they remain in the learning funnel until they repeat and a canonical home is clearer.

group_members.label: Proponer texto estático cuando se necesita una acción concreta
Diseñar feature solo para un provider cuando el framework es multi-provider
Verify skill prerequisites before recommending for zero-prerequisite onboarding
For onboarding first-contact, prefer holistic tools over point tools
Verify data integrity BEFORE audit-driven decisions
Audit existing infrastructure BEFORE proposing new construction

entries.source_label: Harness, gitleaks, sentinel, and edit-race recoveries cluster
entries.rationale: These are tactical recoveries with limited corroboration and no verified governed owner nearby. Per the placement matrix, they remain in the learning funnel until they repeat and a canonical home is clearer.

group_members.label: Repo git-config pollution from test sweep (bare flag, worktree pointer, user identity overrides)
Gitleaks false positive on high-entropy product name slashes
PreToolUse hook blocks legitimate substrings matching TLD malicious-domain patterns
Edit tool fails after linter modifies file between read and edit

entries.source_label: sync_command_mirrors.py overwrites manual edits from stale templates
entries.rationale: The mirror-editing lesson is already covered by canonical mirror governance: generated mirrors are not hand-edited, canonical sources are declared in the manifest, and sync-mirrors is the authorized writer.

entries.source_label: Board-owner mismatch recovery cluster
entries.rationale: The ai-start skill already anchors GitHub project queries on work_items.github_project.owner from manifest, which covers both the explicit owner requirement and the org-vs-user mismatch failure mode.

group_members.label: Board display commands need explicit owner from manifest config
Org vs user project owner mismatch silently returns wrong board data

entries.source_label: Quality-gate and test-contract recoveries cluster
entries.rationale: These are tactical recoveries with limited corroboration and no verified governed owner nearby. Per the placement matrix, they remain in the learning funnel until they repeat and a canonical home is clearer.

group_members.label: SonarCloud new-code coverage gate fails marginally on large PRs
CLAUDE.md hook modifications cause mirror desync on push
Spec claims must be validated against code before implementation
Subagent rate limits during mass parallel dispatch
Full pytest suite times out on large projects — filter by relevance
Rich helpers (kv, status_line, error) output to stderr — tests must check .err

entries.source_label: Cross-document taxonomy must align to single source of truth
entries.rationale: Heuristic or tactical guidance with limited corroboration and no verified governed owner nearby. Per the placement matrix, it remains in the learning funnel until it repeats and a canonical home is clearer.

entries.source_label: Brainstorm → Plan → Dispatch with parallel explore agents
entries.rationale: This workflow is repeated with high confidence and matches the same brainstorm-skill contract gap as L35 and P01. Because it changes one skill's procedure, the placement matrix points it to ai-brainstorm's canonical SKILL.md.

entries.source_label: Parallel diagnostics and cross-cutting standardization workflow cluster
entries.rationale: These remain workflow heuristics with limited corroboration and no verified governed owner nearby. Per the placement matrix, they remain in the learning funnel until they repeat and a canonical home is clearer.

group_members.label: Mass skill maintenance via parallel diagnostic agents + consolidated spec
Config gap → explore all surfaces → cross-cutting standardization

entries.source_label: PR watch-and-fix loop: poll → diagnose → fix → re-push → merge
entries.rationale: The ai-pr skill already owns the watch-and-fix loop, including polling, autonomous diagnosis and repair, and merge completion. Keeping this workflow in instincts duplicates a live skill contract.

entries.source_label: /ai-design for text-based information architecture, not just web UI
entries.rationale: This workflow has repeated evidence and changes the trigger and usage contract of one skill: ai-design currently scopes itself to web and mobile interface work, while this pattern broadens the governed meaning to text-based information architecture. That belongs in the canonical ai-design SKILL.md.

entries.source_label: Autonomous-run chaining and branch-promotion workflow cluster
entries.rationale: These remain workflow heuristics with limited corroboration and no verified governed owner nearby. Per the placement matrix, they remain in the learning funnel until they repeat and a canonical home is clearer.

group_members.label: Spec-driven autonomous chain: brainstorm -> plan -> run with phase-bundled dispatch
Work-branch -> integration-branch promotion via merge --no-ff per item

entries.source_label: ai-explore baseline before DAG/wave planning
entries.rationale: The ai-run skill and intake handler already require ai-explore baseline evidence before DAG and wave planning, so this workflow is already canonical.

entries.source_label: PROP-001: Codify brainstorm parallel-explore workflow pattern
entries.rationale: This proposal is directly corroborated by LESSONS and instincts and maps cleanly to a single skill-contract change in ai-brainstorm. It should graduate out of proposals into the canonical brainstorm skill surface.
